title: Shuckwit's Medieval ModPack
description: This Is A ModPack With A Medieval Theme
body:
This ModPack Is Designed With QuestCraft In Mind Meaning This Modpack Is Fully Compatible with The QuestCraft Launcher For The Quest 2

If You The User Are Planning To Use This Modpack For QuestCraft You MUST Make Sure That The Following Mods From THIS Modpack Are NOT Installed: Vivecraft, Modern Fix, Lithium, Ferrite Core, Faric Language Kotlin, Fabric Api, Entity Culling, Cloth Config, C2me.

The Reason You Do NOT want the listed mods above if you are using questcraft is because those mods listed are already implemented within the mods folder within your quest 2 and said mods are modified Via the creators of questcraft to work using questcraft. adding the mods mentioned above will not let the QuestCraft launcher run correctly creating crashes and errors.

Summary: 
DONT install all mods if on QuestCraft
Install all mods if on pc
